name: ui-regression-pinner generates Playwright DOM-based regression tests using the playwright config template from the React templates
command:
mkdir -p repo/src/components tests/e2e && (cd repo && git init -q && printf 'export const Button=()=>1
' > src/components/Button.tsx) && printf 'import { defineConfig } from "@playwright/test"
export default defineConfig({})
' > "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/templates/playwright.config.ts" 2>/dev/null; bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/agents/ui-regression-pinner.sh" --root repo --feature-id feat-x --tests-out tests/e2e --diff-stub touched=src/components/Button.tsx 2>err.txt && grep -q 'import.*@playwright/test' tests/e2e/feat-x.spec.ts && grep -q 'click\|navigate\|expect' tests/e2e/feat-x.spec.ts && echo ok 1>&2
